description: Declares what a Proposal will affect. files is the load-bearing field: IntentGuard enforces actual write boundaries against this declaration at execution time (CORE-Proposal.md §6). A non-empty files list is the runtime invariant enforced at proposal creation per ADR-026; the AST gate validates field presence only. Governed as a sub-object of Proposal (src/will/autonomy/proposal.py). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.

files.description: Repo-relative file paths this Proposal may modify. Must be non-empty at proposal creation (ADR-026). IntentGuard enforces write boundaries against this list at execution time.

modules.description: Python modules affected by this Proposal. Used for conflict detection via conflicts_with().

symbols.description: Specific symbols (functions/classes) to be changed. Used for conflict detection via conflicts_with().

policies.description: Constitutional policies referenced by this Proposal.
